title: I Want My Tears Back

lyrics.text: I want my tears back
lyrics.translation: 我想再一次热泪盈眶

lyrics.text: The treetops, the chimneys
lyrics.translation: 那些树梢，那些烟囱

lyrics.text: The snowbed stories, winter grey
lyrics.translation: 灰色冬天，那被雪覆盖的故事。

lyrics.text: Wildflowers, those meadows of heaven
lyrics.translation: 花之盛开，草之天堂

lyrics.text: Wind in the wheat
lyrics.translation: 风吹麦田

lyrics.text: A railroad across waters
lyrics.translation: 穿过水域的铁道

lyrics.text: The scent of grandfatherly love
lyrics.translation: 四周弥漫着慈爱的气息。

lyrics.text: Blue bayous, Decembers
lyrics.translation: 每逢十二月，蓝色海湾上，

lyrics.text: Moon through a dragonfly's wings
lyrics.translation: 月亮抚过蜻蜓的翅膀。

lyrics.text: Where is the wonder where's the awe
lyrics.translation: 那些不可思议与惊叹哪儿去了？

lyrics.text: Where's dear Alice knocking on the door
lyrics.translation: 亲爱的爱丽丝正在哪儿敲门？

lyrics.text: Where's the trapdoor that takes me there
lyrics.translation: 到底哪儿才有那扇通往

lyrics.text: Where the real is shattered by a Mad March Hare
lyrics.translation: 被疯狂粉碎了真实的门

lyrics.text: Where is the wonder where's the awe
lyrics.translation: 那些不可思议与惊叹哪儿去了？

lyrics.text: Where are the sleepless nights I used to live for
lyrics.translation: 那些让我为之心心念念的失眠之夜都去哪了？

lyrics.text: Before the years take me
lyrics.translation: 多希望在我老死之前，

lyrics.text: I wish to see the lost in me
lyrics.translation: 我希望看见过去我所迷失的

lyrics.text: I want my tears back
lyrics.translation: 我想再次热泪盈眶

lyrics.text: I want my tears back now
lyrics.translation: 我现在希望过去的我从未哭泣

lyrics.text: A ballet on a grove
lyrics.translation: 芭蕾舞台上，

lyrics.text: Still growing young all alone
lyrics.translation: 还在演绎着经久不衰的林中仙女。

lyrics.text: A rag doll, a best friend
lyrics.translation: 抱上布娃娃，叫个好伙伴，

lyrics.text: The voice of Mary Costa
lyrics.translation: 一起听 Mary Costa 的声音。

lyrics.translation: 那些不可思议与惊叹哪儿去了？

lyrics.translation: 亲爱的爱丽丝正在哪儿敲门？

lyrics.text: Where's the trapdoor that takes me there
lyrics.translation: 到底哪儿才有那扇通往

lyrics.text: Where the real is shattered by a Mad March Hare
lyrics.translation: 被发了疯的三月兔粉碎了真实之地的暗门？

lyrics.translation: 那些不可思议与惊叹哪儿去了？

lyrics.text: Where are the sleepless nights I used to live for
lyrics.translation: 那些让我为之心心念念的失眠之夜都去哪了？

lyrics.translation: 多希望在我老死之前，

lyrics.text: I wish to see the lost in me
lyrics.translation: 能再看一眼我回不去的童年。

lyrics.translation: 那些让我为之心心念念到失眠的都去哪了？
